name: backend_engineer
text: Senior Backend Engineer at a fintech startup. 5+ years of Python, deep Django experience, comfortable with PostgreSQL and Redis. AWS or GCP required. Bonus: event-driven architectures, Kafka. Bengaluru hybrid (3 days in office).

name: ml_engineer
text: ML Engineer working on LLM applications. Strong Python, hands-on with PyTorch, experience fine-tuning models, RAG pipelines, vector databases. 3-7 years. Remote India or San Francisco.

name: product_designer
text: Senior Product Designer for B2B SaaS. Figma expert, design systems, user research chops. 4+ years. Has shipped customer-facing dashboards. Hybrid in Bengaluru or fully remote in EU.
